EPP Partner Application — India 2026

Join India's Most
Exceptional Travel
Partner Network

A structured application to become an authorised TripFactory Exceptional Partner — covering your company KYC, business profile, commercial due diligence, and local launch event. Takes approximately 20–25 minutes.

9 Sections
Indian Compliance (GSTIN · PAN · Aadhaar)
10-Dimension Business Survey
Digital Signature · Manager Sign-off
VG
Welcome to the TripFactory family. This isn't just a business arrangement — it's a long-term partnership built on trust, shared ambition, and the conviction that India's travel industry deserves better.
The Exceptional Partner Programme was built because we believe the best travel businesses in India deserve a platform that matches their ambition. We bring the product, the technology, the marketing support, and the operational backbone — you bring your relationships, your local knowledge, and your drive to grow.

When you join EPP, you're not just gaining access to TripFactory's platform. You're joining a network committed to building India's most trusted travel brand, city by city, partner by partner. We're thrilled you're here.
Vinay Gupta
Chairman & Managing Director · TripFactory / ORN Vacations
Why Join TripFactory EPP
💰
90% of Net Margin — Yours
Keep 90% of every booking's net margin. Transparent, consistent, and paid twice monthly. No hidden deductions.
🌍
150+ Destinations
Access TripFactory's full product portfolio — FIT, Groups, MICE, Fixed Departures, Luxury, Domestic India, and Pilgrimages.
🏷️
Operate Under TripFactory Brand
Co-branded materials, WhatsApp templates, social media assets, and local launch event support — all included.
⚡
Zero Operational Headaches
TripFactory handles negotiation, delivery, and operations. You focus on selling. Your dedicated BDM handles escalations.
🎓
Trip-Ed Training Programme
Structured 3-day induction, destination modules, sales skills, and compliance certification — all included in the platform.
📊
Credit Facility up to ₹20L
Confirm bookings immediately with a 4× Security Deposit multiplier. Grow your business without cash-flow constraints.
📋 Review Before Applying
📄 Download EPP Agreement v1.0 📋 Download EPP Policy Pack (11 Policies)

2 Trade Reference contacts

Cancelled cheque (current a/c)
Approximately 20–25 minutes · Progress saved automatically · Manager approval required before activation
Section 1 of 9 — Company Details

Registered Business Information

Legal registration details as per MCA, GSTIN, and IATA records. All fields must match official government documents.
🏢
Registered Company Details
As per MCA / Registrar of Companies
Required for Pvt Ltd / LLP / OPC
🏆
Travel Industry Licences & Accreditations
Upload copies during document collection
📞
Primary Contact Details
Leave blank if same as mobile
Section 2 of 9 — Director & KYC

Director Identity & Indian Compliance

Indian government-mandated KYC, tax compliance, and banking details. Required under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act 2002, DPDPA 2023, and EPP Agreement Clause 4.
Legal Basis: Collection of PAN, Aadhaar, and GSTIN is mandatory under the Income Tax Act 1961, PMLA 2002, and GST Act 2017. This information is held securely under DPDPA 2023 (Policy 05) and used solely for EPP onboarding verification.
👤
Director / Owner Identity
As per PAN Card and Aadhaar
Must match PAN card exactly
Permanent Account Number — 10 characters
12-digit Aadhaar — stored encrypted
From MCA portal — if applicable
💼
GST & Tax Compliance
GST Act 2017 · Income Tax Act 1961
Note: Commission income from TripFactory is subject to TDS deduction under Section 194H at prevailing rates. If your annual aggregate turnover exceeds ₹20 Lakhs (₹10 Lakhs in special category states), GST registration is mandatory. See EPP Policy 07 (GST Compliance Guide) for full details.
15-character GST Identification Number
Confirm with your Chartered Accountant
🏦
Bank Account Details — Designated Customer Payment Account
As per EPP Agreement Clause 12.5 — separate current account required
Clause 12.5: You must maintain a separate, designated bank account for all Customer payments collected for TripFactory bookings. Customer funds must not be commingled with your own business or personal funds. This is a mandatory EPP Agreement obligation.
11-character IFSC
📎
KYC Document Checklist
Physical copies collected by KAM within 48 hours of approval
Tick all documents you currently have available. Your assigned KAM will contact you within 48 hours of application approval to collect certified copies.
Section 3 of 9 — 10-Dimension Business Survey

Business Profiling — 10 Dimensions

Led by Ashish & Sanjay Gupta. This data shapes your KAM assignment, product alignment, and personalised 90-day growth plan from Day 1. There are no right or wrong answers.
This survey is central to the EPP programme. Please answer honestly — your growth plan depends on it. All information is strictly confidential (EPP Policy 05 — DPDPA 2023).
D1
Business Volume & Revenue
70%
D2
Team & Staff Capability
5 staff
D3
Customer Base & Demographics
D4
Lead Generation & Marketing
25%
D5
Technology & Systems
D6
DMC & Supplier Network
D7
Network & Influence
D8
Operations & Support Needs
D9
Pricing & Competitiveness
D10
Growth Vision & Ambition

Section 5 of 9 — Business Metrics

Current Financial Profile & Migration Plan

Treated as strictly confidential under DPDPA 2023 (Policy 05). Used only for EPP onboarding assessment and growth planning.
All revenue data is confidential and used solely to structure your personalised growth plan and verify your Sales Base (EPP Agreement Clause 6.1 — Schedule A). It will not be shared outside the EPP onboarding team.

Section 6 of 9 — Commercial Due Diligence

Commercial Verification & Trade References

Standard verification required under EPP Agreement Clause 4 and PMLA 2002. All references will be contacted by the EPP onboarding team.
🔍
Trade References — Minimum 2 Required
Tour operators, airlines, hotels, or DMCs you have worked with
Trade Reference 1
Trade Reference 2
⚖️
Compliance Declarations — PMLA 2002 & EPP Agreement Clause 4
Any history of payment defaults with tour operators or airlines?
Any pending or active legal disputes with clients or suppliers?
Business GST-registered and compliant with filing obligations?
Any sub-agent or white-labelling arrangements with other operators?
Any director or partner holds interest in a Competing Business? (EPP Clause 14.4)
Section 7 of 9 — Launch Event

Your TripFactory EPP Launch Event

TripFactory co-funds and supports a local launch event in your city — your official introduction to the market as a TripFactory Exceptional Partner.
🎉
Would you like a TripFactory-supported launch event?
Preferred Venue Type
🍽️
Restaurant / Dinner
Intimate, relationship-focused. Ideal 20–50 guests.
🏨
Hotel Ballroom
Formal presentation, 50–150 guests, full AV.
🏢
Office / In-house
Smaller professional setting. 10–30 guests.
🌿
Resort / Outdoor
Premium feel. Golf club / resort. 50–100 guests.
💻
Hybrid Event
Physical + virtual. Broader geographic reach.
🎯
Travel Fair / Expo
Co-branded booth at local travel roadshow.

Premium
₹1,00,000
+ Full event production, senior TF leadership, media coverage
Suggested Run of Show
6:30 PMGuest arrivals, registration, networking drinks 7:00 PMWelcome address by partner — agency introduction 7:15 PMTripFactory EPP presentation — 90/10 model, platform demo, destinations 7:45 PMDestination showcase — curated packages with live pricing 8:00 PMQ&A, booking registrations, follow-up scheduling 8:15 PMDinner / refreshments + open networking 9:30 PMClose

Section 9 of 9 — Declaration & Digital Signature

Applicant Declaration & Digital Sign-Off

Read all declarations carefully. Your digital signature constitutes your formal authorisation of this application. Manager approval is required before activation.
📋
Legal Documents — Download & Review Before Signing
📄 EPP Agreement v1.0 — Download PDF 📋 EPP Policy Pack v1.0 (11 Policies) — Download PDF
By signing below you confirm you have read and understood both documents in full. The EPP Agreement is 17 pages covering 25 clauses + 5 schedules. The Policy Pack is 31 pages covering all 11 partner policies. Please take time to review before signing.
📜
Applicant Declarations
By submitting this application and signing below, I / we confirm that:

All information provided is true, accurate, and complete to the best of my knowledge. I understand that any misrepresentation may result in immediate rejection or termination of the EPP partnership and may constitute fraud under the Indian Penal Code and PMLA 2002.

I authorise ORN Vacations PTE Ltd to verify all information provided, contact the listed trade references, conduct a standard commercial and credit check, and review all documentation submitted, in accordance with DPDPA 2023.

I have read and understood the EPP Agreement v1.0 (all 25 clauses and Schedules A–E) and the EPP Policy Pack v1.0 (all 11 policies — Schedule D), and agree to be bound by their terms from the Effective Date.

I understand that EPP activation is subject to: (1) successful completion of all 7 onboarding stages, (2) commercial due diligence sign-off, (3) signed EPP Agreement, (4) EPP onboarding fee payment, and (5) manager approval by Seema / Ashutosh. This application does not guarantee activation.

I acknowledge that the 90/10 commission model means TripFactory retains 10% of net margin on every booking, with commission split starting at 80/20 and improving with growth. Net margin is calculated and determined solely by ORN Vacations per Clause 1 of the Agreement.
✍️
Digital Signature — Applicant

Sign using your mouse or finger (touch devices). This constitutes your digital authorisation of the declarations above in accordance with the Information Technology Act 2000.

Applicant Signature
⚠️ Manager Approval Required: This application will be reviewed by the EPP onboarding team (Seema / Ashutosh) within 2 business days. You will receive a confirmation email with your application reference number and your assigned KAM's contact details. Activation follows successful completion of all onboarding stages.
✓

Next Step 1
KAM Introduction
Your dedicated KAM will be introduced by email within 2 business days — along with document collection instructions.
Next Step 2
Document Collection
KAM collects KYC documents, verifies GSTIN/PAN/Aadhaar, contacts trade references, and conducts commercial due diligence.
Next Step 3
Agreement & Activation
EPP Agreement v1.0 sent for signing. On-boarding fee confirmed. Portal login created within 7 days of manager approval.
